get.description:
Get a Users Widgets by their auth token
and return the list of widgets associated
with the user account in the request params.

Add a Users Widget by their auth token.
The config is defined by the configuration parameters as defined by the user and the schema.

get.description:
Get a Users Github Widget by their auth token
and a path parameter to return the GithubWidgetData
This is a special widget that needs authorization outside of
the mindscape so we use the github api to get the data.
